emails.subject: Fw: Due Diligence Request List
emails.body: Fw: Due Diligence Request List Fyi. I will circle back with everyone later today. Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL> Sent: Tue Nov 27 08:42:24 2001

emails.subject: FW: Due Diligence Request List
emails.body: FW: Due Diligence Request List As you can see in the attachment below, this is an extremely exhaustive list of questions/requests (for NNG only). I would strongly suggest that we meet for one hour to go over this list and prepare for Thursday's meeting. Rod: Who from tax should attend? I have asked Gary Smith and Jim Bouillion to attend as well. Kevin

emails.subject: RE: Due Diligence Request List
emails.body: RE: Due Diligence Request List Either Robert Guthrie or greek Rice.

emails.subject: RE: Due Diligence Request List
emails.body: RE: Due Diligence Request List We probably need to get this stuff in the hands of a few more people to make this work smoothly. To: Hayslett, Rod; Fossum, Drew; Corman, Shelley

emails.subject: RE: Due Diligence Request List
emails.body: I have included Paul Cherry, Gary Smith, Jim Bouillion, Greek Rice, Phil Lowry and three from MKM's team. I went through the list and I think we should have everything covered. We are meeting at 4 to go over the requests, timing and responsible parties. I have also asked Kyle Kettler for some materiality threshold (if we hope to get this due diligence done by 2010). All but Phil Lowry are confirmed. To: Howard, Kevin A.; Fossum, Drew; Corman, Shelley

emails.subject: RE: Due Diligence Request List
emails.body: Do you have anyone from Accounting? Saunders? To: Hayslett, Rod

emails.subject: RE: Due Diligence Request List
emails.body: Jim will also be there just inadvertently left him off my list. To: Howard, Kevin A.
